issues.sample: JUST CHANGED  OIL ON MY 2008 CBR1000RR AGAIN TO FIND MY OIL LOW AFTER 2000 MILES. ITS BURNING 1.2QT EVERY 2000 MILES AND SEEMS TO BE BURNING MORE AS I PUT MORE MILES ON THE BIKE. I HAVE OWNED MANY OF HONDA CBR1000 AND THIS IS THE 1ST TO EVER BURN OIL AND THE AMOUNT IS FAR TOO MUC

narrative.headline: What 2008 Honda Cbr1000rr owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 17 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Engine (59% of reports). Some reports involve a fire or crash — read the details below.
